v1_5_9.note: Basket compute ABI + TS_Execution live pin; NOT single-asset selectable; byte-identical compute to v1.5.8 (docstring-only diff). Vaulted 2026-06-17. Authority: config/engine_authority.CANONICAL_ENGINE_ABI.

v1_5_10.note: Direction-aware execution (RESTORATION of OctaFx addendum line-17): SELL fills at bid (= ask - per-bar RESEARCH spread), BUY at ask. P&L formula unchanged.
